allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d\)\); [print\(m['MatchNumber'], m['RoundNumber'], m['Group'], m['HomeTeam'], '-', m['AwayTeam']\) for m in d if m['RoundNumber']>3][:0]; rounds={}; [rounds.setdefault\(m['RoundNumber'],[]\).append\(m['MatchNumber']\) for m in d]; print\({k:\(len\(v\),min\(v\),max\(v\)\) for k,v in rounds.items\(\)}\); print\([m for m in d if m['RoundNumber']>=4][:2]\)")
